title: Nintendo says users voluntarily paid higher prices, have no right to tariff refunds
summary: Nintendo urged a court to dismiss a lawsuit demanding that it pass tariff refunds on to customers, saying that people who bought a Switch console or other products have no legal right to refunds that Nintendo is due to receive from the…
